name: CMP_STMT_GROUP_TEMPLATES_VL
query: SELECT B.STMT_GROUP_TEMPLATE_ID, B.STMT_GROUP_ID, B.STMT_TEMPLATE_ID, B.STMT_WORKER_ACK_ACTION, T.NAME, T.LANGUAGE, T.SOURCE_LANG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.STMT_WORKER_ACK_TIMING FROM CMP_STMT_GROUP_TEMPLATES_B B, CMP_STMT_GROUP_TEMPLATES_TL T WHERE B.STMT_GROUP_TEMPLATE_ID = T.STMT_GROUP_TEMPLATE_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
